Orc: Recently, my favorite club broke...

Orc: Oh, you have a club... Would you trade it for
something rare I have?

Since I have no use for the club, I decided to trade
it...
Orc: Thanks a lot!
You obtained a Youth Potion (for H event)!
A
Orc: Do you have a club?
Orc: I see... You don't have one...
Orc Phew... Holding this club makes me feel at ease...

Orc: There's a legend that fruits can be harvested
from a certain tree. It's said that eating them
increases vitality in the body and blesses one with
children.

Orc: What's even more mysterious is that only newlywed
couples can find those fruits.

Slime: The forests around here are full of wisdom
fruits, you see. That's why the orcs in this town are
quite intelligent.
Slime: Humans are far more barbaric...

Do you know about slime heroes? Apparently, they're
the ones who go through people's dressers without
permission and steal items.

Orc "I wanna eat some 'Fruits of Wisdom'!! They're my
favorite, but as you can see, I'm too busy with work
right now..."

Orc "Hey, I know! If you bring me five 'Fruits of
Wisdom', I'll give you something nice in return! You
can find them on the trees around this town, so go
look for them!"
A
Hand over the Fruit of Wisdom (5 required)
Yes
No
はい
A

Orc: Oh...! You brought them for me? Thanks! Here,
take this as a token of my gratitude.
Received a bunny outfit!
B
Not enough Fruits of Wisdom
いいえ

Orc: Thanks a lot! You guys enjoy those bunny outfits
too!
There's a suspicious gap in the floor...
Try moving it
Leave it alone
動かしてみる
What's this! A staircase has been found.
A
ほっとく

Slime: By the way, recently, I found a spatial
distortion near the entrance of the ruins (tower)~

Slime: I don't really understand it, so I think it's
better not to get close!

Slime: I found a suspicious floor in the back of this
store... It's bothering me, but well... whatever.

Slime: I didn't know this shop had a basement... Huh?
There are human bones? Let's not get any closer...
